Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
with open\('/Users/rochelle/.claude/projects/-Users-rochelle-Desktop-MSB/64c70a02-f02f-4871-b6e7-a9b86be2b010/tool-results/mcp-plugin_figma_figma-get_metadata-1778413914015.txt'\) as f:
    chunk = f.read\(5000000\)

import re
# Look for screen-level nodes - searching for Chinese names
chinese = re.findall\(r'id="\([\\d:]+\)" name="\([^"]*[\\u4e00-\\u9fff][^"]*\)"', chunk\)
seen = set\(\)
for id, name in chinese:
    if name not in seen:
        seen.add\(name\)
        print\(f'{id}: {name}'\)
    if len\(seen\) > 40:
        break
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re, json

with open\('/Users/rochelle/.claude/projects/-Users-rochelle-Desktop-MSB/64c70a02-f02f-4871-b6e7-a9b86be2b010/tool-results/mcp-plugin_figma_figma-get_metadata-1778413914015.txt'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

text = data[0]['text']

# Find direct children of canvas - frames at top level \(2 space indent\)
# Pattern: exactly 2 spaces + <frame
top_frames = re.findall\(r'\\n  <frame id="\([\\d:]+\)" name="\([^"]+\)" x="\(-?[\\d.]+\)" y="\(-?[\\d.]+\)" width="\([\\d.]+\)" height="\([\\d.]+\)"', text\)

print\(f"Total top-level frames: {len\(top_frames\)}"\)
for id, name, x, y, w, h in top_frames:
    if float\(w\) > 800:
        print\(f"  {id}: '{name}' {w}x{h} @\({x},{y}\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re, json

with open\('/Users/rochelle/.claude/projects/-Users-rochelle-Desktop-MSB/64c70a02-f02f-4871-b6e7-a9b86be2b010/tool-results/mcp-plugin_figma_figma-get_metadata-1778413914015.txt'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

text = data[0]['text']

# Look for all frames with width ~1440 \(desktop screen\) or named screens
screens = re.findall\(r'<frame id="\([\\d:]+\)" name="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*width="1440"', text\)
print\("1440px frames:", len\(screens\)\)
for s in screens[:20]:
    print\(f"  {s[0]}: {s[1]}"\)

# Also try 1280
screens2 = re.findall\(r'<frame id="\([\\d:]+\)" name="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*width="1280"', text\)
print\("1280px frames:", len\(screens2\)\)
for s in screens2[:20]:
    print\(f"  {s[0]}: {s[1]}"\)

# Try any frame with width between 1000-2000
big = re.findall\(r'<frame id="\([\\d:]+\)" name="\([^"]+\)" x="[^"]*" y="[^"]*" width="\(1[0-9]{3}\)" height="\(\\d+\)"', text\)
print\(f"Large frames \(1000-1999px\): {len\(big\)}"\)
for id, name, w, h in big[:30]:
    print\(f"  {id}: '{name}' {w}x{h}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re, json

with open\('/Users/rochelle/.claude/projects/-Users-rochelle-Desktop-MSB/64c70a02-f02f-4871-b6e7-a9b86be2b010/tool-results/mcp-plugin_figma_figma-get_metadata-1778413914015.txt'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

text = data[0]['text']

screens = re.findall\(r'<frame id="\([\\d:]+\)" name="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*width="1440"', text\)
# deduplicate by name, keep first occurrence
seen = {}
for id, name in screens:
    if name not in seen:
        seen[name] = id

for name, id in seen.items\(\):
    print\(f"{id}: {name}"\)
EOF)
